positive: An aesthetically pleasing, symmetrical geometric mandala featuring interconnected celestial elements: crescent moons, constellations, stylized flowing nebulae, and subtle planetary rings. The design should be rendered in a clean, bold line art style with abstract, gradient-fill sections that suggest deep space colors (sapphire blue, indigo, cosmic violet, accented by shimmering gold foil highlights). Central composition, perfect symmetry, vector art quality, isolated on a transparent background, high contrast, designed for apparel printing, ultra-detailed, minimal gradients.
